name: Peanut Butter Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and baking powder into a bowl. Add salt and sugar.
2. Stir in the peanut butter until combined.
3. Pour in milk and stir lightly but thoroughly to form a batter.
4. Transfer the batter to an oiled baking pan.
5. Bake at 420°F for 30-35 minutes.
6. Makes 1 small loaf.
